Script to work with Landsat bands derived from GEE

Alicia Valdés

03 julio 2026

Load libraries

library(signal)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(lubridate)
library(dtplyr)
library(sf)
library(knitr)
library(mgcv)
library(future)
library(furrr)
library(progressr)
library(pracma)

Load functions

knitr::purl("functions_20260611.Rmd", output = "functions_20260611.R")
[1] "functions_20260611.R"
source("functions_20260611.R")

Supress package messages

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(mgcv)
  library(nlme)
})

Load previously created objects

load(file = "objects/data_RS_Landsat_bands_indices.Rdata")
load(file = "objects/GAM_data_Landsat.Rdata")
load(file = "objects/smoothed_data_Landsat.Rdata")
load(file = "objects/monthly_avg_indices_Landsat.Rdata")

Load Resurvey db

ReSurvey_data <- read_csv(
   here("data", "clean","ReSurvey_QRST_data_V2025.2_20260618.csv")) %>%
  select(PlotObservationID, RS_CODE, `ReSurvey site`, `ReSurvey plot`, EUNIS1, 
         EUNIS2, `Location method`,  year, Lon_updated, Lat_updated,
         EUNIS_assignation) %>%
  mutate(PlotObservationID = factor(PlotObservationID),
         EUNIS1 = factor(EUNIS1), EUNIS2 = factor(EUNIS2))

Read files with band data

I got these files using the GEE code prepared by Bea.

These files contain all observations in the ReSurvey database from all years. In order to avoid computation problems in GEE, biogeographical units that contain more than 4500 points have been subdivided in ArcGIS.

From the observation year

# Set the folder path
folder_path <- "C:/Data/MOTIVATE/MOTIVATE_RS_data/validation/Landsat/obs_year"

# List CSV files
csv_files <- list.files(folder_path, full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)

# Read one file to get column names
sample_file <- csv_files[1]
sample_data <- read_csv(sample_file, n_max = 0)

# Read and process each file
data_list <- lapply(csv_files, function(file) {
  info <- extract_info(basename(file)) # Use only the filename
  
  # Read the file
  df <- read_csv(file) %>%
    mutate(biogeo = info$biogeo, unit = info$unit)
  
  return(df)
  })

# Combine all data
data_RS_Landsat_bands_obs <- bind_rows(data_list) %>%
  rename(PlotObservationID = PltObID) %>%
  select(-UNIT)

# View the resulting tibble
print(data_RS_Landsat_bands_obs)
# A tibble: 1,973,426 × 15
   `system:index`  Blue Green   NIR PlotObservationID   Red SWIR1 date       image_id time_utc
   <chr>          <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>             <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <date>     <chr>    <time>  
 1 59_1_1_1_LT05… 16809 16904 20890            346390 16488 15827 1984-06-07 1_1_1_L… 09:32   
 2 59_1_1_1_LT05…  9343 10007 16716            346390  9766 13699 1984-10-13 1_1_1_L… 09:34   
 3 59_1_1_1_LT05…  8468  8600 11207            346390  8699  8505 1984-10-29 1_1_1_L… 09:34   
 4 59_1_1_1_LT05… 10238 11034 18162            346268 11384 17787 1984-10-13 1_1_1_L… 09:34   
 5 59_1_1_1_LT05…  9419 10032 16720            346390  9787 12995 1984-10-13 1_1_1_L… 09:34   
 6 59_1_1_1_LT05… 10212 11428 19190            346415 12091 18910 1984-10-13 1_1_1_L… 09:34   
 7 59_1_1_1_LT05… 10780 12038 17743            346455 12626 16514 1984-10-13 1_1_1_L… 09:34   
 8 59_1_1_1_LT05…  8999  8985 12343            346490  9055  9882 1984-10-13 1_1_1_L… 09:34   
 9 59_1_1_1_LT05…  8992  9394 12968            346521  9054 10590 1984-10-13 1_1_1_L… 09:34   
10 59_1_1_1_LT05… 10238 11034 18989            346554 11384 18632 1984-10-13 1_1_1_L… 09:34   
# ℹ 1,973,416 more rows
# ℹ 5 more variables: timestamp <dbl>, year <dbl>, .geo <chr>, biogeo <chr>, unit <chr>
# ℹ Use `print(n = ...)` to see more rows
# Counts per biogeo and unit
print(data_RS_Landsat_bands_obs %>% count(biogeo, unit), n = 100)

From the previous year

# Set the folder path
folder_path <- "C:/Data/MOTIVATE/MOTIVATE_RS_data/validation/Landsat/prev_year"

# List CSV files
csv_files <- list.files(folder_path, full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)

# Read one file to get column names
sample_file <- csv_files[1]
sample_data <- read_csv(sample_file, n_max = 0)

# Read and process each file
data_list <- lapply(csv_files, function(file) {
  info <- extract_info(basename(file)) # Use only the filename
  
  # Read the file
  df <- read_csv(file) %>%
    mutate(biogeo = info$biogeo, unit = info$unit)
  
  return(df)
  })

# Combine all data
data_RS_Landsat_bands_prev <- bind_rows(data_list) %>%
  rename(PlotObservationID = PltObID) %>%
  select(-UNIT)

# View the resulting tibble
print(data_RS_Landsat_bands_prev)

From the posterior year

# Set the folder path
folder_path <- "C:/Data/MOTIVATE/MOTIVATE_RS_data/validation/Landsat/post_year"

# List CSV files
csv_files <- list.files(folder_path, full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)

# Read one file to get column names
sample_file <- csv_files[1]
sample_data <- read_csv(sample_file, n_max = 0)

# Read and process each file
data_list <- lapply(csv_files, function(file) {
  info <- extract_info(basename(file)) # Use only the filename
  
  # Read the file
  df <- read_csv(file) %>%
    mutate(biogeo = info$biogeo, unit = info$unit)
  
  return(df)
  })

# Combine all data
data_RS_Landsat_bands_post <- bind_rows(data_list) %>%
  rename(PlotObservationID = PltObID) %>%
  select(-UNIT)

# View the resulting tibble
print(data_RS_Landsat_bands_post)

Read file with band data for points outside polygons

Some points from the ReSurvey database fall outside the bioregion polygons. These points were manually assigned to the closest biogeo and unit in ArcGIS (those far out were assigned biogeo = OUT and unit = OUT). Data for these points has been extracted with a different GEE script.

From the observation year

data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_obs <- read_csv(
  "C:/Data/MOTIVATE/MOTIVATE_RS_data/validation/Landsat_out/AllPoints_Landsat_Annual.csv") %>%
  rename(biogeo = BIOGEO, unit = UNIT, PlotObservationID = PltObID)

Check that column names are the same:

# Columns in data_RS_Landsat_bands_obs but not in data_RS_Landsat_bands_out
setdiff(names(data_RS_Landsat_bands_obs), names(data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_obs))
character(0)
# Columns in data_RS_Landsat_bands_out but not in data_RS_Landsat_bands_obs
setdiff(names(data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_obs), names(data_RS_Landsat_bands_obs))
[1] "location"

From the previous year

data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_prev <- read_csv(
  "C:/Data/MOTIVATE/MOTIVATE_RS_data/validation/Landsat_out/AllPoints_Landsat_PREVIOUS_YEAR.csv") %>%
  rename(biogeo = BIOGEO, unit = UNIT, PlotObservationID = PltObID)

Check that column names are the same:

# Columns in data_RS_Landsat_bands_prev but not in data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_prev
setdiff(names(data_RS_Landsat_bands_prev), names(data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_prev))
character(0)
# Columns in data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_prev but not in data_RS_Landsat_bands_prev
setdiff(names(data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_prev), names(data_RS_Landsat_bands_prev))
[1] "location"

From the posterior year

data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_post <- read_csv(
  "C:/Data/MOTIVATE/MOTIVATE_RS_data/validation/Landsat_out/AllPoints_Landsat_POSTERIOR_YEAR.csv") %>%
  rename(biogeo = BIOGEO, unit = UNIT, PlotObservationID = PltObID)

Check that column names are the same:

# Columns in data_RS_Landsat_bands_post but not in data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_post
setdiff(names(data_RS_Landsat_bands_post), names(data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_post))
character(0)
# Columns in data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_post but not in data_RS_Landsat_bands_post
setdiff(names(data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_post), names(data_RS_Landsat_bands_post))
[1] "location"

Join all data from inside polygons

data_RS_Landsat_bands <- bind_rows(data_RS_Landsat_bands_obs,
                                   data_RS_Landsat_bands_prev,
                                   data_RS_Landsat_bands_post) %>%
  mutate(image_year = case_when(!is.na(image_year) ~ image_year,  
                                TRUE ~ year(date)
                                ),
         point_year = case_when(!is.na(point_year) ~ point_year,  
                                TRUE ~ year),
         year_cat = case_when(image_year == point_year ~ "obs",
                              image_year < point_year ~ "prev",
                              image_year > point_year ~ "post",
                              TRUE ~ NA_character_)
         )

Join all data from outside polygons

data_RS_Landsat_bands_out <- bind_rows(data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_obs,
                                       data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_prev,
                                       data_RS_Landsat_bands_out_post) %>%
  mutate(image_year = case_when(!is.na(image_year) ~ image_year,  
                                TRUE ~ year(date)
                                ),
         point_year = case_when(!is.na(point_year) ~ point_year,  
                                TRUE ~ year),
         year_cat = case_when(image_year == point_year ~ "obs",
                              image_year < point_year ~ "prev",
                              image_year > point_year ~ "post",
                              TRUE ~ NA_character_)
         )

Join all data

data_RS_Landsat_bands_all <- bind_rows(data_RS_Landsat_bands, 
                                       data_RS_Landsat_bands_out) %>% 
  select(-location)

Some checks

Check that the year in the date of the images is not different to the sampling year:

data_RS_Landsat_bands %>% dplyr::filter(year != year(date) & year_cat == "obs")

Check how many different images are for each observation, date and time:

data_RS_Landsat_bands %>% group_by(PlotObservationID, date, time_utc) %>%
  summarise(n_images = n_distinct(image_id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  count(n_images)

Average the bands

When there is more than one image for each point and day, average the values of the bands:

Calculate indices

Save:

Plot n_daytime:

data_RS_Landsat_bands_indices %>%
  group_by(PlotObservationID) %>%
  summarise(n_days = first(n_days)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = n_days)) + geom_histogram(color = "black", fill = "white") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 10, color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  theme_minimal()

Compute phenological metrics from models fitted to time series data

Calculation

Apply the function with batch processing

plan(sequential)

Number of plot observations with less than 10 DOYs

data_RS_Landsat_bands_indices %>%
  dplyr::filter(PlotObservationID %in% 
                  (ReSurvey_data %>%
                     distinct(PlotObservationID) %>%
                     pull(PlotObservationID))) %>%
  count(PlotObservationID) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(n < 10) %>% 
  nrow()
[1] 918

Save

Look:

GAM_data

Save as an object:

Add year to GAM_data:

GAM_data <- GAM_data %>%
  left_join(data_RS_Landsat_bands_indices %>%
              select(PlotObservationID, year) %>%
              distinct(),
            by = "PlotObservationID")

Extract average values of indices per month

Extract average values of indices per month and AUC between March and October;

Save as an object:

Smooth the time series of NDMI and NDWI

Apply the function with batch processing.

plan(sequential)

Save

Look:

smoothed_data

Save as an object:

Get indices data (max. and min.)

These maximum and minimum values are from the smoothed time series. For values in DOY 1–50 and DOY 315–end, the GAM smoothing function replaced the original values with the mean base value of observations during each of these respective periods (this has now been done for all indices, i.e. NDVI, EVI, SAVI, NDMI and NDWI).

final_indices_data <- GAM_data %>%
  group_by(PlotObservationID, index) %>%
  summarise(max = max(value), min = min(value)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = index, values_from = c(max, min),
              names_glue = "{index}_{.value}") %>%
  full_join(
    smoothed_data %>%
      group_by(PlotObservationID, index) %>%
      summarise(max = max(value), min = min(value)) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = index, values_from = c(max, min),
                  names_glue = "{index}_{.value}")
    )

Get phenology data

Use GAM iter_3 to get dates of the moments, values at those moments and AUC (time-integrated indices) between SOS and EOS:

# Join to get values at SOS, POS, EOS and auc
final_phenology_data <- GAM_data %>%
  mutate(
    stage = case_when(
      DOY == sos_slope ~ "sos",
      DOY == pos ~ "pos",
      DOY == eos_slope ~ "eos",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(stage)) %>%
  select(PlotObservationID, index, stage, doy = DOY, value) %>% 
  # Remove duplicate rows
  distinct() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = c(index, stage),
    values_from = c(doy, value),
    names_glue = "{index}_{stage}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  # Convert list cols to regular numeric cols
  mutate(
    NDVI_sos_value = map_dbl(NDVI_sos_value, 1),
    NDVI_pos_value = map_dbl(NDVI_pos_value, 1),
    NDVI_eos_value = map_dbl(NDVI_eos_value, 1),
    EVI_sos_value = map_dbl(EVI_sos_value, 1),
    EVI_pos_value = map_dbl(EVI_pos_value, 1),
    EVI_eos_value = map_dbl(EVI_eos_value, 1),
    SAVI_sos_value = map_dbl(SAVI_sos_value, 1),
    SAVI_pos_value = map_dbl(SAVI_pos_value, 1),
    SAVI_eos_value = map_dbl(SAVI_eos_value, 1)
  ) %>%
  full_join(GAM_data %>%
              distinct(PlotObservationID, index, auc_slope) %>%
              rename(auc = auc_slope) %>%
              pivot_wider(names_from = index, values_from = c(auc),
                          names_glue = "{index}_{.value}"))

Join indices and phenology data

final_RS_data <- full_join(
  # Indices data (max and min)
  final_indices_data,
  # Average values of indices per month
  monthly_avg_indices %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = index, values_from = c(avg_value_01:auc_mar_oct),
                names_glue = "{index}_{.value}")
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    # Phenology data
    final_phenology_data 
    ) %>%
  # Sort cols in alphabetical order
  select(PlotObservationID, sort(names(.)[names(.) != "PlotObservationID"]))

Add EUNIS codes

final_RS_data <- ReSurvey_data %>% left_join(final_RS_data)
data_RS_Landsat_bands_indices <- data_RS_Landsat_bands_indices %>%
  left_join(ReSurvey_data)

Monthly spectrophenology per habitat type

# Prepare the data
data_monthly_EUNIS1 <- data_RS_Landsat_bands_indices %>%
  mutate(month = month(date, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE, locale="EN-us")) %>%
  group_by(month, EUNIS1) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_NDVI = mean(NDVI, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_NDVI = sd(NDVI, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_NDVI = sum(!is.na(NDVI)),
    mean_EVI = mean(EVI, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_EVI = sd(EVI, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_EVI = sum(!is.na(EVI)),
    mean_SAVI = mean(SAVI, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_SAVI = sd(SAVI, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_SAVI = sum(!is.na(SAVI)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

data_monthly_EUNIS1 <- data_monthly_EUNIS1 %>%
  # Add label with n
  left_join(data_monthly_EUNIS1 %>%
              group_by(EUNIS1) %>%
              summarise(n_total = sum(n_NDVI, na.rm = TRUE)), 
            by = "EUNIS1") %>%
  mutate(EUNIS1_label = paste0(EUNIS1, " (n = ", n_total, ")"))

data_monthly_EUNIS2 <- data_RS_Landsat_bands_indices %>%
  mutate(month = month(date, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE, locale="EN-us")) %>%
  group_by(month, EUNIS1, EUNIS2) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_NDVI = mean(NDVI, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_NDVI = sd(NDVI, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_NDVI = sum(!is.na(NDVI)),
    mean_EVI = mean(EVI, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_EVI = sd(EVI, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_EVI = sum(!is.na(EVI)),
    mean_SAVI = mean(SAVI, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_SAVI = sd(SAVI, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_SAVI = sum(!is.na(SAVI)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

data_monthly_EUNIS2 <- data_monthly_EUNIS2 %>%
  # Add label with n
  left_join(data_monthly_EUNIS2 %>%
              group_by(EUNIS2) %>%
              summarise(n_total = sum(n_NDVI, na.rm = TRUE)), 
            by = "EUNIS2") %>%
  mutate(EUNIS2_label = paste0(EUNIS2, " (n = ", n_total, ")"))

EUNIS level 1

# Plots

# EUNIS1
ggplot(data_monthly_EUNIS1, 
       aes(x = month, y = mean_NDVI, color = EUNIS1, 
           group = EUNIS1)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line(aes(group = EUNIS1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Monthly NDVI by Habitat Type",
    x = "Month",
    y = "NDVI",
    color = "Habitat (EUNIS1)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  here("output", "figures", "monthly_spectrophenology_Landsat", "EUNIS1_NDVI.jpeg"),
  dpi = 300, width = 6, height = 2.5)


ggplot(data_monthly_EUNIS1, 
       aes(x = month, y = mean_EVI, color = EUNIS1, 
           group = EUNIS1)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Monthly EVI by Habitat Type",
    x = "Month",
    y = "EVI",
    color = "Habitat (EUNIS1)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  here("output", "figures", "monthly_spectrophenology_Landsat", "EUNIS1_EVI.jpeg"),
  dpi = 300, width = 6, height = 2.5)


ggplot(data_monthly_EUNIS1, 
       aes(x = month, y = mean_SAVI, color = EUNIS1, 
           group = EUNIS1)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Monthly SAVI by Habitat Type",
    x = "Month",
    y = "SAVI",
    color = "Habitat (EUNIS1)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  here("output", "figures", "monthly_spectrophenology_Landsat", "EUNIS1_SAVI.jpeg"),
  dpi = 300, width = 6, height = 2.5)

EUNIS level 2

Q

# NDVI
ggplot(data_monthly_EUNIS2 %>% 
         dplyr::filter(EUNIS1 == "Q" & !is.na(EUNIS2)) %>%
         # Remove those with EUNIS level 2 that does not match current classif
         dplyr::filter(EUNIS2 != "Qa" & EUNIS2 != "Qb"), 
       aes(x = month, y = mean_NDVI, color = EUNIS2, group = EUNIS2)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Monthly NDVI by Habitat Type",
    x = "Month",
    y = "NDVI",
    color = "Habitat (EUNIS2)"

  theme_minimal()

Calculate other phenological metrics

final_RS_data <- final_RS_data %>%
  mutate(
    # with slope method
    # Growing season duration
    NDVI_gsd = NDVI_eos_doy - NDVI_sos_doy,
    EVI_gsd = NDVI_eos_doy - NDVI_sos_doy,
    SAVI_gsd = SAVI_eos_doy - SAVI_sos_doy,
    # Difference in value between pos and sos
    NDVI_diff_pos_sos_value = NDVI_pos_value - NDVI_sos_value,
    EVI_diff_pos_sos_value = EVI_pos_value - EVI_sos_value,
    SAVI_diff_pos_sos_value = SAVI_pos_value - SAVI_sos_value,
    # Difference in value between pos and eos
    NDVI_diff_pos_eos_value = NDVI_pos_value - NDVI_eos_value,
    EVI_diff_pos_eos_value = EVI_pos_value - EVI_eos_value,
    SAVI_diff_pos_eos_value = SAVI_pos_value - SAVI_eos_value,
    # Difference in doy between pos and sos
    NDVI_diff_pos_sos_doy = NDVI_pos_doy - NDVI_sos_doy,
    EVI_diff_pos_sos_doy = EVI_pos_doy - EVI_sos_doy,
    SAVI_diff_pos_sos_doy = SAVI_pos_doy - SAVI_sos_doy,
    # Absolute difference in doy between pos and eos
    NDVI_diff_pos_eos_doy = abs(NDVI_pos_doy - NDVI_eos_doy),
    EVI_diff_pos_eos_doy = abs(EVI_pos_doy - EVI_eos_doy),
    SAVI_diff_pos_eos_doy = abs(SAVI_pos_doy - SAVI_eos_doy),
    # With months method
    # Difference in value between pos and march
    NDVI_diff_pos_march_value = NDVI_pos_value - NDVI_avg_value_03,
    EVI_diff_pos_march_value = EVI_pos_value - EVI_avg_value_03,
    SAVI_diff_pos_march_value = SAVI_pos_value - SAVI_avg_value_03,
    # Difference in value between pos and oct
    NDVI_diff_pos_oct_value = NDVI_pos_value - NDVI_avg_value_10,
    EVI_diff_pos_oct_value = EVI_pos_value - EVI_avg_value_10,
    SAVI_diff_pos_oct_value = SAVI_pos_value - SAVI_avg_value_10,
    # Difference in doy between pos and march
    NDVI_diff_pos_march_doy = NDVI_pos_doy - 75, 
    EVI_diff_pos_march_doy = EVI_pos_doy - 75,
    SAVI_diff_pos_march_doy = SAVI_pos_doy - 75,
    # Difference in doy between pos and oct
    NDVI_diff_pos_oct_doy = abs(NDVI_pos_doy - 285),
    EVI_diff_pos_oct_doy = abs(EVI_pos_doy - 285),
    SAVI_diff_pos_oct_doy = abs(SAVI_pos_doy - 285)
  )

Checks

Slope method

# Growing season duration should be positive
nrow(final_RS_data %>% 
       dplyr::filter(NDVI_gsd <= 0 | EVI_gsd <= 0 | 
                       SAVI_gsd <= 0))
[1] 0
# Difference in value between pos and sos should be positive
nrow(final_RS_data %>%
       dplyr::filter(NDVI_diff_pos_sos_value <= 0))
[1] 48
nrow(final_RS_data %>%
       dplyr::filter(EVI_diff_pos_sos_value <= 0))
[1] 1267
nrow(final_RS_data %>%
       dplyr::filter(SAVI_diff_pos_sos_value <= 0))
[1] 36
# Difference in value between pos and eos should be positive
nrow(final_RS_data %>%
       dplyr::filter(NDVI_diff_pos_eos_value <= 0))
[1] 380
nrow(final_RS_data %>%
       dplyr::filter(EVI_diff_pos_eos_value <= 0))
[1] 6165
nrow(final_RS_data %>%
       dplyr::filter(SAVI_diff_pos_eos_value <= 0))
[1] 357
# Difference in doy between pos and sos should be positive
nrow(final_RS_data %>%
       dplyr::filter(NDVI_diff_pos_sos_doy <= 0 |
                       EVI_diff_pos_sos_doy <= 0 |
                       SAVI_diff_pos_sos_doy <= 0))
[1] 0
# Difference in doy between eos and pos should be positive
nrow(final_RS_data %>%
       dplyr::filter(NDVI_diff_pos_eos_doy <= 0 |
                       EVI_diff_pos_eos_doy <= 0 |
                       SAVI_diff_pos_eos_doy <= 0))
[1] 0

Further checks (EVI)

Slope method

# Difference in value between pos and sos should be positive
nrow(final_RS_data %>%
       dplyr::filter(EVI_diff_pos_sos_value <= 0))
[1] 1267
# Difference in value between pos and eos should be positive
nrow(final_RS_data %>%
       dplyr::filter(EVI_diff_pos_eos_value <= 0))
[1] 6165

Add some columns needed

final_RS_data <- final_RS_data %>%
  left_join(
    data_RS_Landsat_bands_indices %>%
      distinct(PlotObservationID, year, biogeo, unit)
    )

Add plotID, remove unneeded columns + add needed columns

final_RS_data <- final_RS_data %>% 
  mutate(plotID = paste(RS_CODE, `ReSurvey site`, `ReSurvey plot`, sep = "-")) %>%
  select(-RS_CODE, -`ReSurvey site`, -`ReSurvey plot`, -EUNIS2, 
         -starts_with("EVI"), -matches("_(01|02|04|05|06|07|08|09|11|12)$"),
         -biogeo, -unit)

Save to clean data

write_tsv(final_RS_data,
          here("data", "clean","final_RS_data_bands_Landsat_all_20260702.csv"))
